widgets.name: Recent Published Posts
widgets.description: Displays the 5 most recently published posts with clickable links, author names, and publication dates. Includes hover effects and custom styling.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT p.ID, p.post_title, p.post_date, p.post_excerpt, u.display_name AS author FROM {{posts}} p LEFT JOIN {{users}} u ON p.post_author = u.ID WHERE p.post_type = 'post' AND p.post_status = 'publish' ORDER BY p.post_date DESC LIMIT 5
widgets.template:
• •

widgets.name: Site Overview Stats
widgets.description: At-a-glance dashboard showing key site metrics: total posts, pages, users, and approved comments with color-coded stats cards.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_type = 'post' AND post_status = 'publish') AS published_posts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_type = 'page' AND post_status = 'publish') AS published_pages, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {{users}}) AS total_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {{comments}} WHERE comment_approved = '1') AS approved_comments

widgets.name: Recent Comments
widgets.description: Shows the 5 most recent approved comments with commenter name, post title, and excerpt. Includes visual indicators for comment status.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT c.comment_ID, c.comment_author, c.comment_date, c.comment_content, SUBSTRING(c.comment_content, 1, 100) AS excerpt, p.post_title, p.ID as post_id FROM {{comments}} c LEFT JOIN {{posts}} p ON c.comment_post_ID = p.ID WHERE c.comment_approved = '1' AND c.comment_type = 'comment' ORDER BY c.comment_date DESC LIMIT 5
widgets.template:

widgets.name: Newest Registered Users
widgets.description: Displays the 5 most recently registered users with their display names and registration dates in an interactive table with sorting capabilities.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT ID, user_login, display_name, user_email, user_registered FROM {{users}} ORDER BY user_registered DESC LIMIT 5

widgets.name: Top Categories by Post Count
widgets.description: Shows the top 10 most popular post categories ranked by post count. Includes clickable links and visual count badges.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT t.name AS category_name, t.slug, tt.count AS post_count, t.term_id FROM {{table_prefix}}terms t INNER JOIN {{table_prefix}}term_taxonomy tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id WHERE tt.taxonomy = 'category' AND tt.count > 0 ORDER BY tt.count DESC LIMIT 10
widgets.template:
$row ) : ?>

widgets.name: Post Type Status Summary
widgets.description: Visual breakdown of posts and pages by publication status. Displays published, draft, pending, and trash items organized by content type.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT post_type, post_status, COUNT(*) AS total FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_type IN ('post', 'page') AND post_status NOT IN ('auto-draft', 'inherit') GROUP BY post_type, post_status ORDER BY post_type ASC, total DESC
widgets.template:
'#28a745', 'draft' => '#ffc107', 'pending' => '#ff9800', 'trash' => '#dc3545', 'private' => '#17a2b8' ); ?>
$rows ) : ?>

widgets.name: Published Pages
widgets.description: Lists all published pages ordered by most recently modified. Built with the Visual Builder — no code required.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT post_title, post_modified FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_type = 'page' AND post_status = 'publish' ORDER BY post_modified DESC LIMIT 10
widgets.template: Post Title Post Modified

widgets.name: Awaiting Moderation
widgets.description: Comments pending approval so you can review and moderate them directly from the dashboard. Built with the Visual Builder.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT comment_author, comment_date, comment_content FROM {{comments}} WHERE comment_approved = '0' AND comment_type = 'comment' ORDER BY comment_date DESC LIMIT 10
widgets.template: Comment Author Comment Date Comment Content

widgets.name: Most Commented Posts
widgets.description: Bar chart ranking your top posts by comment activity. Built with the Visual Builder using bar chart display mode.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT post_title, comment_count FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_type = 'post' AND post_status = 'publish' AND comment_count > 0 ORDER BY comment_count DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.name: Category Distribution
widgets.description: Pie chart showing how posts are distributed across categories. Built with the Visual Builder using a JOIN and pie chart display mode.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT t.name, tt.count FROM {{table_prefix}}term_taxonomy tt LEFT JOIN {{table_prefix}}terms t ON tt.term_id = t.term_id WHERE tt.taxonomy = 'category' AND tt.count > 0 ORDER BY tt.count DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.name: Recent Media Uploads
widgets.description: Tracks the latest file uploads to your media library with file type. Built with the Visual Builder — no code required.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT post_title, post_date, post_mime_type FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_type = 'attachment' ORDER BY post_date DESC LIMIT 10
widgets.template: Post Title Post Date Post Mime Type

widgets.name: Posts Published by Year
widgets.description: Bar chart showing how many posts were published each year. Spot publishing trends and content gaps over time.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT YEAR(post_date) AS year, COUNT(*) AS post_count FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_type = 'post' AND post_status = 'publish' GROUP BY YEAR(post_date) ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.name: Top Commenters
widgets.description: Bar chart ranking the most active commenters on your site by total approved comments submitted.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT comment_author, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM {{comments}} WHERE comment_approved = '1' AND comment_type = 'comment' GROUP BY comment_author ORDER BY comment_count DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.name: Published Content by Type
widgets.description: Bar chart comparing the number of published items across posts, pages, and attachments.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT post_type, COUNT(*) AS total FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_status = 'publish' AND post_type IN ('post', 'page', 'attachment') GROUP BY post_type ORDER BY total DESC

widgets.name: Monthly Post Activity
widgets.description: Line chart tracking monthly post publication counts. Identify content patterns, seasonal gaps, and publishing consistency.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(post_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS post_count FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_status = 'publish' AND post_type = 'post' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(post_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12

widgets.name: Monthly User Registrations
widgets.description: Line chart showing new user registrations per month. Track growth trends and measure the impact of campaigns or promotions.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(user_registered, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS new_users FROM {{users}} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(user_registered, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12

widgets.name: Post Status Breakdown
widgets.description: Pie chart showing how your posts are distributed across publication statuses — published, draft, pending, private, and more.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT post_status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_type = 'post' AND post_status NOT IN ('auto-draft', 'inherit', 'trash') GROUP BY post_status ORDER BY count DESC

widgets.name: Top Tags by Usage
widgets.description: Pie chart visualizing how your most popular tags are distributed by post count. Built with a JOIN across term tables.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT t.name, tt.count FROM {{table_prefix}}term_taxonomy tt LEFT JOIN {{table_prefix}}terms t ON tt.term_id = t.term_id WHERE tt.taxonomy = 'post_tag' AND tt.count > 0 ORDER BY tt.count DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.name: Media File Types
widgets.description: Pie chart breaking down your media library by file type group — images, video, audio, documents, and more.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(post_mime_type, '/', 1) AS file_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_type = 'attachment' AND post_mime_type != '' GROUP BY file_type ORDER BY count DESC

widgets.name: Comment Moderation Status
widgets.description: Doughnut chart showing the proportion of comments in each moderation state — approved, pending, spam, and trash.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN comment_approved = '1' THEN 'Approved' WHEN comment_approved = '0' THEN 'Pending' WHEN comment_approved = 'spam' THEN 'Spam' ELSE 'Trash' END AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM {{comments}} WHERE comment_type = 'comment' GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

widgets.name: Posts vs Pages vs Attachments
widgets.description: Doughnut chart comparing how your total content is split between posts, pages, and media attachments.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT post_type, COUNT(*) AS total FROM {{posts}} WHERE post_type IN ('post', 'page', 'attachment') AND post_status != 'auto-draft' GROUP BY post_type ORDER BY total DESC

widgets.name: Category Usage Share
widgets.description: Doughnut chart showing how your top categories share post volume. Built with a JOIN across term and taxonomy tables.
widgets.sql_query: SELECT t.name, tt.count FROM {{table_prefix}}term_taxonomy tt LEFT JOIN {{table_prefix}}terms t ON tt.term_id = t.term_id WHERE tt.taxonomy = 'category' AND tt.count > 0 ORDER BY tt.count DESC LIMIT 6

notifications.title: Getting Started
notifications.message: Create your first widget using the Widget Manager. Write a SQL query, design a template, and it appears on your WordPress dashboard instantly.

notifications.title: SQL Query Tip
notifications.message: Use {{table_prefix}} in your queries to reference tables portably across environments. It resolves to your site's actual WP table prefix at runtime.

notifications.title: Performance Tip
notifications.message: Enable caching on widgets with heavy queries to avoid re-running them on every dashboard load. Set a TTL that matches how often your data changes.

notifications.title: Backup Reminder
notifications.message: Export your widget configurations regularly so you always have a restore point before making major changes.

notifications.title: Security: Table Allowlist
notifications.message: The Table Allowlist in Settings restricts which database tables your widgets can query. Tighten it to limit exposure of sensitive data.
